title: UFO Experts Release Another Proof of Secret Government Group Hiding Alien Truth From White House for Decades
description: A new documentary claims the US government has hidden evidence of UFOs and alien life for decades, with insiders alleging a secret programme operated beyond congressional oversight.

title: I'm a pastor who attended a secret UFO disclosure meeting. We saw images of 'translucent beings' that chilled me to the bone... the files could fulfil a dark biblical prophecy
description: Religious leaders who say they were part of secret UFO disclosure meetings have come forward to issue a stark warning.

title: UFO Expert Criticizes Pentagon Files, Explains Why Alien Sightings Are Questionable
description: UFO expert Dr Greg Seab questions the evidence in newly released Pentagon UFO files but believes there is life beyond Earth.
